title: BEM-533.3 Telegram synthetic E2E
objective:
Run script:
"""
artifacts = Path('governance/internal_contour/e2e/bem533_telegram')
artifacts.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report = Path('governance/reports/bem533_3_telegram_synthetic_e2e.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem533_3_telegram_synthetic_e2e.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
state = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}

cycle = 'bem533-telegram-synthetic-e2e'
records = []
steps = [
  ('telegram_intake','telegram','curator','telegram_input.json'),
  ('intake','curator','executor','curator_to_executor.json'),
  ('execution','executor','curator','executor_result.md'),
  ('telegram_ack','curator','curator','curator_ack.json'),
  ('final_result','curator','curator','curator_closure.md')
]
for record_type, from_role, to_role, filename in steps:
    path = artifacts / filename
    if filename.endswith('.json'):
        path.write_text(json.dumps({'cycle_id':cycle,'record_type':record_type,'source':'telegram','from_role':from_role,'to_role':to_role,'status':'completed','secret_policy':'no_secrets_in_file'}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    else:
        path.write_text('# ' + filename + '\n\nBEM-533 Telegram synthetic E2E artifact: ' + from_role + ' -> ' + to_role + ', PASS. No live API, no secrets.\n')
    records.append({'record_type':record_type,'cycle_id':cycle,'source':'telegram','from_role':from_role,'to_role':to_role,'status':'completed','artifact_path':str(path),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 12:57 (UTC+3)'})

with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    for rec in records:
        f.write(json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

state['cycle_id'] = cycle
state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 12:57 (UTC+3)'
state['source'] = {'type':'telegram','mode':'synthetic_webhook'}
state['curator_status'] = 'CLOSED'
state['active_role'] = 'curator'
state['next_role'] = None
state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-533.3','title':'Telegram synthetic E2E','status':'completed'}
state['blocker'] = None
hist = state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list):
    hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 12:57 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-533.3 Telegram synthetic E2E PASS','cycle_id':cycle})
state['history'] = hist
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report.write_text('# BEM-533.3 | Telegram Synthetic E2E | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:57 (UTC+3)\n\n## Chain\nTelegram synthetic input -> curator -> executor -> curator closure.\n\n## Artifacts\n`governance/internal_contour/e2e/bem533_telegram/`\n\n## Transport\nRecords appended to `governance/transport/results.jsonl`.\n\n## State\n`governance/state/role_cycle_state.json` updated with cycle `bem533-telegram-synthetic-e2e`.\n\n## Security\nNo live Telegram API. No Telegram token. No secrets in files.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
proof.write_text('BEM-533.3 PASS: Telegram synthetic E2E completed without secrets/live API.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(transport), str(state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
for item in artifacts.iterdir():
    changed_files.append(str(item))
ops_applied.append('BEM-533.3 completed Telegram synthetic curator E2E')
"""
No issue comments.
